station_name: Vikram Auto Services ( Petrol Pump, 24 HRS CNG filling and Car Service Station)
station_address: Balasaheb Sawant Road, Juhu Versova Link Rd, Four Bungalows, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053
text: It is the BPCL Petrol pump on Juhu Versova Link Road just before the four bungalows signal. It also has compressed natural gas (CNG) pump. Also, you can get free air filled from the Bharat Petroleum staff. There are many mechanics nearby, if you want to get some mechanical job done to your two or four wheeler. Mostly open till late. Unlike other BPCL outlets, this doesnt have an in and out store.

station_address: Balasaheb Sawant Road, Juhu Versova Link Rd, Four Bungalows, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053
text: Most Pathetic and non efficient petrol pump in whole Mumbai.. At a given time there are 12 to 15 bikes 6 to 8 cars waiting to fill petrol Or deisal and other 8 to 9 cars waiting to fill cng.. Bcs their cng and petrol machines don't work at a time. Not bcs lack of staff ita bcs the management and inefficient staff. This also creates traffic on link road.. More waiting and waste of time.. Better go to Prakash Auto on Juhu Circle..

station_name: Vikram Auto Services ( Petrol Pump, 24 HRS CNG filling and Car Service Station)
station_address: Balasaheb Sawant Road, Juhu Versova Link Rd, Four Bungalows, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053
text:
Very low on service . Staff is not polite and trained . FREE AIR is not provided as a courtesy as per rules . In fact today they were not available till 8.30 am for air .REASON owner has kept compressor under lock and key . After filling a full tank of 4000 k one expects air to be checked before a long drive . And this is a regular feature . In case u want courteous service please use another pump . Why get humiliated

To ur reply Vikram petrol pump

I have mentioned the day and time . U are quoting wrong facts and locals are fed up of your poor service . Why not invest in polite well trained staff and adhere to timings strictly

station_name: Vikram Auto Services ( Petrol Pump, 24 HRS CNG filling and Car Service Station)
station_address: Balasaheb Sawant Road, Juhu Versova Link Rd, Four Bungalows, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053
text: I reside in Mira Road. And possess XUV 500 W 10 AT. I normally fill Indian oil disel. But, I had the opportunity to fill Disel at the Vikram Auto service and petrol pump. Besides being a shade cheaper than at other petrol pump, the quantity filled was accurate, as observed from my km data.  As a result, now onwards, when ever I visit Andheri, I make it a point to have my XUV topped up with disel, at the Vikram Petrol pump. I have switched from Indian oil to BPCL.

text: This petrol pump is a scam there will always be some or other issues fuel cutting is common in this petrol pump and now a days they have started a new scam They fill the tank full of car or bike even if you say them the specific amount later they say sorry it was done by mistake and remove the fuel again at that the actual scam start you have 13 liter tank as most of bike have reserved of 3.5 liter they make it full by adding 9.5 something later they will be like all of it refuel again and they will charge it to you

station_name: Vikram Auto Services ( Petrol Pump, 24 HRS CNG filling and Car Service Station)
station_address: Balasaheb Sawant Road, Juhu Versova Link Rd, Four Bungalows, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053
text: The dealer has been present for a long time and has facilities for fuel, PUC, and a body shop (?). The entry and exit are significant choke points during most of the day. The staff at this station seem to be too preoccupied. Card swipe machines often do not work properly or lack a charge. The facility has a limited stock of other vehicle needs like motor oils, etc. Auto rickshaws and two-wheelers generally create a menace here as they are not effectively managed. Air filling is a choke point and even spills on the road. Unauthorised parking at the entry and exit should be stopped from a safety point of view.
